_comment_target: Action-conditioned legacy variant v3 (ActionRenderConcatAdapter) on the full 795-clip droid_1k train split, FSDP. v3 = per-(t,h,w) concat of render and broadcast action features → MLP → kaiming-init Linear → ADD to temb_base → time_proj. Designed to avoid v2's V-span attractor (which produced the universal tint). With kaiming-init out_proj, the model starts with a non-trivial contribution and learns to use or suppress it — same dynamics as egowm's render_encoder. ~9M adapter params (vs v2's 141M).
_eval_note: In-training eval: flow-MSE every epoch on held-out set (~30s). PSNR/SSIM disabled — too costly and we trust flow-MSE as the generalization signal. Held-out set is train_metadata_test.csv (89 scenes never seen by the model).
